sourcesContent:
import AppShell from "../components/AppShell"; import AlertCard from "../components/AlertCard"; import EmptyState from "../components/EmptyState"; import InsightPanel from "../components/InsightPanel"; import MetricCard from "../components/MetricCard"; import PageHeader from "../components/PageHeader"; import PrimaryButton from "../components/PrimaryButton"; import SectionCard from "../components/SectionCard"; import TrendChartCard from "../components/TrendChartCard"; import DataTable from "../components/DataTable"; import { useVitalPulse } from "../context/VitalPulseContext"; import { formatDateTime, formatMetric, formatNumber, formatRelativeTime, } from "../utils/formatters"; function facilityRows(context) { return [ { label: "Monitoring API", value: context.errors.latest ? "Offline" : "Online" }, { label: "Alerts API", value: context.errors.alerts ? "Offline" : "Online" }, { label: "Node-RED", value: "Endpoint required" }, { label: "Database", value: "Endpoint required" }, { label: "ML engine", value: context.derived.mlAvailable ? "Loaded" : "Pending" }, { label: "Latest reading", value: formatDateTime(context.latestReading?.timestamp) }, { label: "Facility risk", value: context.derived.riskLabel }, { label: "Last sync", value: formatRelativeTime(context.lastSync) }, ]; } export default function OverviewPage() { const context = useVitalPulse(); const { latestReading, trendSamples, alerts, derived } = context; const patientRows = latestReading ? [ { id: latestReading.timestamp, patient: "Patient endpoint required", device: latestReading.device_id || "Unavailable", heartRate: formatMetric(latestReading.heart_rate, "bpm"), temperature: formatMetric(latestReading.temperature, "deg C"), spo2: formatMetric(latestReading.spo2, "%"), risk: derived.riskLabel, lastReading: formatDateTime(latestReading.timestamp), status: derived.deviceState, }, ] : []; return ( Generate Report} >
String(item.severity).toLowerCase() === "critical").length)} helper="No critical alerts in current feed" status="Warning" />
{alerts.length ? (
Critical{alerts.filter((item) => String(item.severity).toLowerCase() === "critical").length}
Warning{alerts.filter((item) => String(item.severity).toLowerCase() === "warning").length}
Open{alerts.filter((item) => String(item.status).toLowerCase() === "open").length}
) : ( )}
Observed live sources{derived.observedDevices.length}
Current state{derived.deviceState}
Registry coverageEndpoint required
Current risk{derived.riskLabel}
Anomaly score{latestReading?.anomaly_score ?? "Unavailable"}
Clinical summary{latestReading ? "Realtime telemetry active" : "No reading received"}
{facilityRows(context).map((item) => (
{item.label} {item.value}
))}
{alerts.length ? (
{alerts.slice(0, 4).map((alert) => )}
) : ( )}
); }
